department_meta.name: Department of Administration
department_meta.mission: To make Milwaukee one of the nation’s most attractive cities to live, work, and do business.

department_meta.name: Assessor's Office
department_meta.mission: Establish public confidence in the accuracy, efficiency, and fairness of the assessment process and ensure the equitable distribution of the city’s property tax levy.

department_meta.name: Department of City Development
department_meta.mission: Improve the quality of life in Milwaukee by guiding and promoting development that creates jobs, builds wealth, and strengthens the urban environment.

department_meta.name: City Treasurer
department_meta.mission: To fulfill the duties and responsibilities of the independently elected City Treasurer, who serves as the chief investment and revenue collection officer of the City of Milwaukee.

department_meta.name: Common Council City Clerk
department_meta.mission: To establish city policy and law, oversee the administration of city government, adopt the annual budget, ensure the delivery of services to constituents, provide the public with information about the duties and actions of city government, and to manage an equitable and efficient licensing system that supports business operations while providing adequate protections for the public.

department_meta.name: Comptroller's Office
department_meta.mission: To serve City of Milwaukee residents by maintaining strong fiscal oversight and delivering transparent, accurate, and timely financial services, while providing exceptional customer service to City of Milwaukee departments and other agencies which directly serve the public.

department_meta.name: Election Commission
department_meta.mission: To serve as the city’s consolidated Emergency Communications Center that provides effective and timely 9-1-1 dispatch, and resource allocation services to the community and public safety professionals.

department_meta.name: Department of Emergency Communications
department_meta.mission: DER is a leader in HR excellence, dedicated to meeting the evolving needs of our multifaceted workforce, empowering employees to thrive and serve the City of Milwaukee with purpose

department_meta.name: Department of Employee Relations
department_meta.mission: Through independent, civilian oversight of Milwaukee’s public safety departments, the Fire and Police Commission (FPC) strives to enhance public safety for our residents, promote accountability and public trust, increase diversity within the departments, and safeguard the constitutional rights of all people.

department_meta.name: Fire and Police Commission
department_meta.mission: Protect people and property within our city, remaining responsive to the needs of our citizens by providing rapid, professional, humanitarian services essential to the health, safety and well-being of the city. Prevent loss of life from fire, limit fire-related property damage, and improve the chances of survival from life threatening medical and traumatic injury emergencies.

department_meta.name: Fire Department
department_meta.mission: Advance the health and equity of Milwaukeeans through science, innovation, and leadership.

department_meta.name: Health Department
department_meta.mission: Build a safer, stronger, and more prosperous city for all Milwaukee residents.

department_meta.name: Library
department_meta.mission: Through the enforcement of Building, Zoning, Fire, Environmental, Property Maintenance, and other ordinances, DNS protects the value of investments in neighborhoods and commercial corridors, and supports community goals of building safe and healthy neighborhoods and increasing investment and economic vitality throughout the City.

department_meta.name: Mayor's Office
department_meta.mission: To enhance the overall economic and social environment of the City and region by stimulating trade, business, and employment.

department_meta.name: Municipal Court
department_meta.mission: Provide business and administrative support for DPW, deliver services to constituents through economic development related projects and contract administration, serve as the liaison to the public and elected officials, and manage media relations and special event permits.

department_meta.name: Department of Neighborhood Services
department_meta.mission: Enable the secure and efficient movement of vehicles, bicycles, pedestrians, and data throughout the city.

department_meta.name: Police Department
department_meta.mission: Provide essential services that maintain the cleanliness, safety and attractiveness of Milwaukee to enhance the quality of life for citizens, businesses, and visitors.

department_meta.name: Department of Public Works - Infrastructure Services
Department of Public Works - Operations
department_meta.mission: Secure payment of retirement benefit obligations in a manner that seeks to avoid destabilizing city operations and that limits the transfer of financial responsibility to future generations by funding those obligations over the remaining work life of System members in an actuarially sound basis.

department_meta.name: Provision for Employes' Retirement Fund
department_meta.mission: Administer the plan as provided under the city charter, as a fiduciary pursuant to state and federal requirements as an IRS-qualified retirement plan and trust, maintain member and beneficiary records, pay the benefits to which members and beneficiaries are entitled, communicate with and council members and beneficiaries, and invest and manage the funds of the trust in a prudent and vigilant manner.

department_meta.name: Capital Improvements
department_meta.mission: Manage and control outstanding debt through equitable financing of capital improvements.

department_meta.name: City Debt
department_meta.mission: Provide budgetary authority and funding to pay for emergencies that arise during the year for which no provisions have been made elsewhere in the budget.

department_meta.name: Grant and Aid Fund
department_meta.mission: Provide expenditure authority for excess Tax Incremental District (TID) revenue.

department_meta.name: Water Works
department_meta.mission: Protect people, property, and the environment from sewage, flooding, erosion, and polluted runoff.

department_meta.name: Sewer Maintenance Fund
department_meta.mission: Provide appropriation authority to purchase County of Milwaukee delinquent property taxes.
